content: Next.js 16 (App Router): revalidatePath(path, type?) and revalidateTag(tag, profile?). Both callable only in Server Functions and Route Handlers, NOT in Client Components or proxy. revalidatePath operates on the route file structure (use the destination path if using rewrites). revalidateTag single-arg form is DEPRECATED in 16; use revalidateTag(tag, 'max') for stale-while-revalidate semantics, or migrate to updateTag. Tags assigned via fetch({next:{tags:[...]}}) or cacheTag() inside 'use cache' functions. PPR/Cache Components enabled via next.config.ts cacheComponents:true, using 'use cache' directive with cacheLife() and cacheTag() — not the old experimental.ppr flag. Wrap per-request/dynamic data in <Suspense> so the static shell streams immediately and dynamic content streams in.
